video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library with warm wood textures. Natsu Ironleaf 028, a healer in cream and mint robes, and Natsu Starling, a mage in layered blue robes, stand together. They raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons swirling between them, readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous arcane library shot; Natsu Starling adjusts her hand position while Natsu Ironleaf 028 maintains focus, the soft mana ribbons stabilize into a steady glowing arc between both characters, calm teamwork, gentle atmosphere, no combat harm, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is non-sexual, cooperative, and focused on harmless spell practice in a fantasy setting. No harmful, violent, or inappropriate content is depicted.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Synchronizing mana to stabilize the residual mana anomaly caused by the relic in the library.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Effective collaboration on complex arcane research.
